description: ol-style-one-command-per-line (issue #169): a multi-line bracket-form repeat body puts two commands (print 1, print 2) on the same physical line. Since the second command necessarily starts at a different column than the first, this fixture also naturally exercises ol-style-block-indentation (the shared-line print 2 disagrees with the block's own baseline column) and ol-style-prefer-block (the block is a multi-line bracket form). All three are genuine, expected findings for this source, not incidental noise.
